[about]  [projects]  [blog]

My name is John Hadaway. I am a programmer and urban planning student, skilled in spatial data science, data visualisation, and front-end development. My interests include collective behaviour and decision-making, local innovation, urban governance, spatial analytics, data visualisation, and interface design.

I am Australian, Filipino, and Finnish, and currently based in Helsinki — via Chicago, Montpellier, London, Manila, Cebu City, Almaty, Moscow, and Jakarta. In my spare time, I like to cycle, read and write, watch documentaries, and listen to music. You can reach me via email. I am also on Linkedin and Github.
